1802160.name: Storage Hunters
1802160.description:
Have you already heard about storage auctions? Do you want to try, but be afraid of the risks? This game was created especially for you! Hundreds of storages, garages, realistic auction system! Buy, open, pay off, upgrade!

- Open world
- Unique upgrading system
- Realistic auction system
- In-game marketplaces

You can be at the top of the storage business. Try it and find out for yourself what it feels like to be rich!
1802160.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
